# DeepLine Operations

> Operations automation specialists for industrial and MRO distributors. We audit sales, logistics, and admin processes and deliver a step-by-step AI-automation playbook.

## About
DeepLine Operations helps industrial distributors ($5M-$75M revenue) migrate from manual chaos to AI-automated operations. Founded by Mo Roowala, M.S. Robotics & Mechatronics from NYU Tandon, with 6+ years in data systems engineering and process automation.

## Services
- Free Operations Diagnostic: comprehensive audit of sales, marketing, logistics, and admin processes to identify every automation opportunity
- Automation Roadmap: which processes are ready to automate now, which need cleanup first, and the exact order to tackle them
- 90-Day Implementation Playbook: step-by-step plan with timelines, expected ROI, and zero guesswork

## Key Facts
- No ERP overhaul required — works alongside your existing systems
- No 6-figure 18-month timeline — automation in weeks, not years
- Focus on data readiness first — clean data before layering automation
- Scale without adding headcount by automating back-office operations
- Covers: sales process, quoting, logistics routing, invoicing, data entry, reporting
